name: STAMP: Provenance-Guided Credit Assignment for Deep Search Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.11172v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning for deep-search agents has largely focused on trajectory-level scoring -- outcome correctness, citation-aware rewards, and evi...
description: arXiv:2607.11172v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning for deep-search agents has largely focused on trajectory-level scoring -- outcome correctness, citation-aware rewards, and evidence coverage. Yet the actions that expose supporting documents receive no targeted credit, a gap we call the reward-credit mismatch. We propose STAMP, in which a reference-based verifier judges whet...
author: Ke Xu, Han Xu, Xinran Chen, Yuqian Wang, Zhixuan Li, Xiaojian Liu, Changwo Wu, Jianqiang Xia, Yuchen Li
